description:
Smart. Focused. Email.

Fast, cross-platform email designed to filter out the noise - so you can focus on what's important.
In this update, we’ve focused on improving app stability and fixing key bugs reported by our community.
Bug Fixes
- Resolved a problem with adding and sending attachments.
- Window order now stays consistent after reactivating the app.
- Fixed a bug where window position wasn’t saved after restarting Spark.
- Resolved an issue where maximized windows remained stuck after relaunch.
We recommend updating to this version for a smoother and more reliable experience.
We’d love to hear your feedback.
If you notice any other issues or want to share your thoughts, please reach out at support@sparkmailapp.com.
Thank you for helping us improve Spark!

P.S. If you encounter any issues with the automatic update, please use the following link to download the update manually:
https://downloads.sparkmailapp.com/Spark3/win/beta/3.24.1.111355/Spark.exe
